title: Lessertia obtusata
taxonomy: Lessertia obtusata is classified within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf structure and flower morphology. The genus Lessertia is a group of flowering plants that are native to southern Africa. Lessertia obtusata is a species within this genus, and its classification is further defined by its specific leaf and flower features. The plant's classification as a legume reflects its unique ability to fix nitrogen from the air, a trait that is characteristic of plants in the Fabaceae family.
